rationale: The skill primarily runs the semgrep CLI to scan code (reading source files across the project) and emits findings to stdout or output files like results.sarif/results.json. Rule creation involves writing YAML rule files and test files in a <rule-id>/ directory structure. Semgrep fetches rulesets like p/security-audit and p/owasp-top-ten from semgrep.dev's registry over the network, and installation may invoke pip, brew, or docker. Local references under references/ are also read.
